title: NestJS Application Generator
description: Create a NestJS application with Vitest and Biome

directory.description: The directory of the new application
directory.x-prompt: Which directory do you want to create the application in?

tags.description: Add tags to the application (used for linting)

skipPackageJson.description: Do not add dependencies to package.json

strict.description: Adds strictNullChecks, noImplicitAny, strictBindCallApply, forceConsistentCasingInFileNames and noFallthroughCasesInSwitch to tsconfig
